'''gongakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetothyriaceous|chaetothyriaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetothyriaceous|chaetothyriaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gongakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongakithi|gongakithi]] || [[word:gongakiji|gongakiji]] || [[word:gongakishi|gongakishi]] || [[word:gongakiki|gongakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongakuthuthu|gongakuthuthu]] || [[word:gongakujuju|gongakujuju]] || [[word:gongakushushu|gongakushushu]] || [[word:gongakukuku|gongakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongakuthu|gongakuthu]] || [[word:gongakuju|gongakuju]] || [[word:gongakushu|gongakushu]] || [[word:gongakuku|gongakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongakufthuf|gongakufthuf]] || [[word:gongakufjuf|gongakufjuf]] || [[word:gongakufshuf|gongakufshuf]] || [[word:gongakufkuf|gongakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongakethe|gongakethe]] || [[word:gongakeje|gongakeje]] || [[word:gongakeshe|gongakeshe]] || [[word:gongakeke|gongakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongakothotho|gongakothotho]] || [[word:gongakojojo|gongakojojo]] || [[word:gongakoshosho|gongakoshosho]] || [[word:gongakokoko|gongakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongakotho|gongakotho]] || [[word:gongakojo|gongakojo]] || [[word:gongakosho|gongakosho]] || [[word:gongakoko|gongakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongakofthof|gongakofthof]] || [[word:gongakofjof|gongakofjof]] || [[word:gongakofshof|gongakofshof]] || [[word:gongakofkof|gongakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongakïfthïf|gongakïfthïf]] || [[word:gongakïfjïf|gongakïfjïf]] || [[word:gongakïfshïf|gongakïfshïf]] || [[word:gongakïfkïf|gongakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongakïfthïfthïf|gongakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gongakïfjïfjïf|gongakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gongakïfshïfshïf|gongakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gongakïfkïfkïf|gongakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongakïfthïf|gongakïfthïf]] || [[word:gongakïfjïf|gongakïfjïf]] || [[word:gongakïfshïf|gongakïfshïf]] || [[word:gongakïfkïf|gongakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongakïfthïf|gongakïfthïf]] || [[word:gongakïfjïf|gongakïfjïf]] || [[word:gongakïfshïf|gongakïfshïf]] || [[word:gongakïfkïf|gongakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongakæthæ|gongakæthæ]] || [[word:gongakæjæ|gongakæjæ]] || [[word:gongakæshæ|gongakæshæ]] || [[word:gongakækæ|gongakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongakathatha|gongakathatha]] || [[word:gongakajaja|gongakajaja]] || [[word:gongakashasha|gongakashasha]] || [[word:gongakakaka|gongakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongakatha|gongakatha]] || [[word:gongakaja|gongakaja]] || [[word:gongakasha|gongakasha]] || [[word:gongakaka|gongakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongakafthaf|gongakafthaf]] || [[word:gongakafjaf|gongakafjaf]] || [[word:gongakafshaf|gongakafshaf]] || [[word:gongakafkaf|gongakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gongakasha|gongakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongakshësha|gongakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakrosha|gongakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakmusha|gongakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongakyasha|gongakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongaknkshësha|gogongaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongaknkrosha|gogongaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongaknkmusha|gogongaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongaknkyasha|gogongaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gongangakasha|gongangakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongangakshësha|gongangakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangakrosha|gongangakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangakmusha|gongangakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangakyasha|gongangakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongangaknkshësha|gogongangaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongangaknkrosha|gogongangaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongangaknkmusha|gogongangaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongangaknkyasha|gogongangaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gengækasha|gengækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gengækshësha|gengækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gengækrosha|gengækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gengækmusha|gengækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gengækyasha|gengækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogengæknkshësha|gogengæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogengæknkrosha|gogengæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogengæknkmusha|gogengæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogengæknkyasha|gogengæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gongfakasha|gongfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongfakshësha|gongfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongfakrosha|gongfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongfakmusha|gongfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongfakyasha|gongfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongfaknkshësha|gogongfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongfaknkrosha|gogongfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongfaknkmusha|gogongfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongfaknkyasha|gogongfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
